meta.name: Shirsak Sahoo
meta.title: Senior Software Engineer · Full-Stack · AI/ML · React · Python · AWS
meta.location: Bangalore, India - open to relocation globally

summary: Full-stack AI/ML engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-native systems. Currently at JPMorgan Chase Asset & Wealth Management (SDE3 / Associate Vice President), architecting MCP server infrastructure and the Connect Studio AI platform. Experienced across React, TypeScript, Python, AWS, and agentic systems. BITS Pilani graduate seeking relocation to Netherlands.

cloud_devops: AWS (ECS, EFS, S3, CloudFront, Sagemaker, CloudWatch)

Worked closely with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of AI features into the existing product suite

The platform became the foundation for all subsequent products in the Aurigo suitem, enabling rapid development and consistent user experience across the board

Built internal tools to streamline product adoption by solution engineers and clients
